title: Sabarimala reference hearing: Live updates from Supreme Court - Day 9
description: Advocate Ashwini Upadhyay: My Lords, every action has a reaction, and every judgment has ramifications. Coming from an engineering background, I tend to look at this through a structured lens, what will happen if the argument is accepted, and what will happen if it is not. What are the long-term consequences? Whether, over the next twenty five years, we move towards a more integrated and developed society, or whether the outcome leads to deeper fragmentation.
